site.name: Aevum
site.description: The architecture of a long, high-quality life. Protocols, biomarkers and optimization technology analyzed with scientific rigor.

home.hero: The science of living longer and better
home.heroSub: Longevity protocols, biomarkers and human optimization technology analyzed with scientific evidence. No hype, no miracle promises.

article.affiliateDisclosure: This article contains affiliate links. If you purchase through them, we receive a commission at no extra cost to you. This allows us to maintain Aevum as an independent resource.

newsletter.title: Aevum Briefing
newsletter.description: Every week: one protocol, one evidence analysis and what matters in longevity. No noise. Straight to your inbox.
newsletter.premiumDesc: Complete protocols, curated stacks and in-depth biomarker analysis.

footer.about: Aevum is an independent precision longevity lab. We analyze protocols, technology and supplements with scientific rigor so you can make informed decisions about your healthspan.

wearables.title: Biomarkers & Tracking
wearables.description: Monitoring devices, smart rings and measurement systems to quantify your biology and make data-driven decisions.

supplements.title: Supplementation & Longevity
supplements.description: NMN, NR, resveratrol, magnesium and NAD+ precursors. Real scientific evidence, no exaggerated claims.

protocols.title: Protocols & Science
protocols.description: Evidence-based guides to optimize sleep, recovery, cognition and healthspan. What works and what doesn't.

beauty.title: Skin Longevity & Premium Cosmetics
beauty.description: The new paradigm in cosmetics: skin health and rejuvenation from cellular biology. Augustinus Bader, La Prairie, evidence-backed ingredients.
